series_metadata.series_description: Administrative Records generated to assist Business Enterprise (BE) administration with oversight and tracking of the program. Records may include: Grievance Log; unassigned/assigned income/disbursement spreadsheet and supporting documentation; revenue and budget projections spreadsheets, OBG/OOD activity files; Key Bank ACH/EDI Operations Passkey; Authorizations; invoices; Equipment Audit Reports; staff meeting agendas; notes and sign-in sheets; and any addition administrative record or supporting document relating to the BE Program not already included in a retention schedule.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for three (3) federal fiscal years and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for three (3) federal fiscal years and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
